ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Liquorice (62%) [Wheat Flour, Wheat Glucose Syrup, Treacle, Molasses, Sugar, Thickener (Maize Starch 1442 or Wheat Fibre), Vegetable Oil, Colours (102, 129, 133, 150d), Liquorice Extract, Flavour, Salt, Emulsifier (471)] Dark Chocolate (38%) [Sugar, Cocoa Mass, Cocoa Butter, Butter Oil (Milk), Emulsifier (Soy Lecithin, 476), Flavour] Dark Chocolate contains Cocoa Solids 48%. May contain traces of peanuts or other nuts
product_name: Double Coated Chocolate Bites - Liquorice with Dark Chocolate
